历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10101 → 8212 → 11281 → 10972 → 10811, showing an overall fluctuating and slightly declining trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 10811, with a fluctuation range of about 2500 in the past three years. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science (physics category) was: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, an increase of about 22.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is approximately 48th, with a stable ranking in the 44–53 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its education field (planned to enroll 3100 master's students in 2026, with an estimated 15,000 applicants). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67 (average), with no obvious record of enrollment gaps, indicating stable overall application attention. It has six A-level disciplines: Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-, placing its disciplinary strength among the top in 211 normal universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's science enrollment majors mainly include Chemistry (Teacher Training), Physics, Computer Science, and Biological Sciences. Computer Science is highly recommended due to social popularity, while Biological Sciences corresponds to the Biology A- discipline but belongs to the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials (clearly discouraged). In 2026, the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (about 285,700). The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 229,400, intensifying competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Yunnan Province, making it a cross-province application. Yunnan examinees generally have average regional preference for universities in Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10811, the 22.2% expansion of science plans in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), the significant increase in the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province (intensifying competition), and the slightly positive reputation (attracting more examinees), and taking into account the easing effect of the large expansion on competition, the predicted minimum ranking after a slight adjustment is about 12202, with a range of 11702–12702.

- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)

- Digital Media Technology (Teacher Training)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11702–12702, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Physics/Digital Media Technology, with Tier 1 majors like Chemistry (Teacher Training) and Computer Science as reach options, and Tier 3 Biological Sciences as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (< 11702), you can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science or Chemistry (Teacher Training).

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2915, a 10% reduction in the 2026 history category enrollment plan (which would decrease the ranking number), a significant increase of about 32% in Yunnan history category examinees (intensifying competition), and a generally positive reputation (attracting students), along with the competitive push from the increased number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking is slightly adjusted upward to approximately 2770, with a range of 2271–3269.
